untranslatable_reason: Signal references explicit z-score calculations (entry_threshold_zscore: 1.5, exit_threshold_zscore: 1.0) which are not available as direct indicators in the allowed list. Z-score requires mean and standard deviation calculations that must be computed externally. Approximated using Bollinger Band percent B (bb_pct_b) as a proxy for normalized price deviation from rolling mean, but this is not an exact z-score implementation.
translation_notes: Mean-reversion strategy translated using Bollinger Bands percent B as a proxy for z-score deviation. Entry triggered when price deviates significantly from SMA_100 (rolling mean proxy) and bb_pct_b indicates extreme positioning (< 0.25 for long, > 0.75 for short). Exit when price reverts toward the mean (bb_pct_b approaches 0.5). Lookback window of 100 bars incorporated via SMA_100. The exact z-score thresholds (1.5 entry, 1.0 exit) cannot be directly implemented without z-score calculation capability.
